narrative:
05 court of appeals district has 1,023,824 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.4% D−R vs -18.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
